---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something new, or flag a gap in the spec
title: '[feature] '
labels: feature
---

## What you want

_One sentence. Who wants it, what they want, why._

## Which phase does this fit

Check `docs/roadmap.md` and `docs/phase-N-plan.md`. Propose a phase if you
can; if you're unsure, just pick "not sure" and we'll triage.

- [ ] Phase 0 — skeleton (in progress)
- [ ] Phase 1 — course entry + race timer
- [ ] Phase 2 — charts
- [ ] Phase 3+ — see roadmap
- [ ] Post-v1 cruising platform
- [ ] Not sure

## Does this contradict any locked decision

Skim `docs/decisions.md`. If yes, explain why the decision should be
revisited. If no, say so.

## Sketch (optional)

_Mockup, rough layout, example inputs/outputs, links to similar apps, etc._
